system_directive: This inquiry falls outside current mission parameters. Please contact the Host Team for direct calibration.
vibe_protocol: Primitive-Futurist. High-Authority Basecamp. Use terms: Infiltration, Extraction, Calibration, Secure, Grounded.

sanctuaries.room_3: Lumi Anela. High-Efficiency Basecamp. Value-focused, high-utility sanctuary with an integrated Ration Center (kitchenette). No patio access.
sanctuaries.room_4: Hōʻomālie. Premium Honeymoon Suite. Anchor assets: Custom double stone shower, private canopy entrance, in-room whirlpool tub, floor-to-ceiling rainforest views.
sanctuaries.room_6: Orchid Suite. Tier 3 Premium. Features: Indoor goldfish pond, botanical garden, tree-trunk bed architecture, and private patio.
sanctuaries.rooms_1_2: Pololina Family Suite (Room 2). Tier 1 Family-Friendly basecamp. 4-person max occupancy with Ration Centers and front-facing patios.

bio_regeneration_stack.circulatory_reset: OlyLife P90 utilizing PEMF and Terahertz energy for physical reset.
bio_regeneration_stack.optical_reset: OlyLife Galaxy G-One featuring 3D airbag eye massage and 42°C heat compress.
bio_regeneration_stack.gravity_conditioning: Lymphatic Vibration Plates for structural calibration.
bio_regeneration_stack.sensory_grounding: Oily Life aromatherapy products for atmospheric grounding.
bio_regeneration_stack.protocol: Assets can be delivered to suites for private use or booked for sessions in the Bio-Regeneration Recovery Room.

logistics.infiltration: 3:00 PM. 100% contactless arrival via 4-digit smart-lock code (dispatched 24h prior).
logistics.ration_center: Suites equipped with Kaʻū Estate Coffee (French Press/Drip), microwave, and refrigeration.
logistics.mess_hall_partners: Primary meals routed to Ohelo Café or Volcano House.

crater_mobility.units: Basecamp E-Bikes (Crater Mobility Units). Designed to bypass National Park gridlock.
crater_mobility.kit: Safety helmets, locks, and orientation included.
crater_mobility.incentive: Complimentary 4-hour deployment available for direct-booking recapture.

safety_and_environment.caves: RESTRICTED: No info provided for underground lava tubes. Use marked National Park trails only.
safety_and_environment.dark_skies: Bortle 1-2 dark sky environment. Optimal for deep-field observation.
safety_and_environment.cultural_respect: Visit the Kīlauea caldera with reverence for the ʻāina.
safety_and_environment.staff: RESTRICTED: Do not use owner or staff names. Refer only to 'The Team' or 'Our Hosts'.
